content.en:
Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the other geniuses of the evil clan entered the realm of dreams one by one, and as soon as they entered the realm of dreams, it was like coming to a small river, where a special kind of water flowed, full of golden light.

The realm of dreams is not big, and after the geniuses entered here, they each chose a place and began to comprehend and cultivate.

Almost all the geniuses of the evil clan were cultivating the domain arts, and few of them had created the domain ancestor method.

And Ye Tian was very serious and began to create the Domain Ancestor Method, but the Creation of the Domain Ancestor Method couldn't be seen, if he didn't say it, others wouldn't know.

Therefore, the other geniuses also thought that Ye Tian was cultivating domain arts.

With the passage of time, many geniuses' domain techniques have advanced greatly, and Ye Tian's domain ancestor method has also improved slightly.

In the realm of dreams, Ye Tian seems to be able to see the scenes of the future, in fact, he created the scenes of the Domain Ancestor Method, and the Fantasy Realm will give you guidance and let you embark on the right path in the creation of the Domain Ancestor Method.

It is precisely because of this that the fantasy world has such a wonderful effect.

The Domain Ancestor Method that Ye Tian was about to create was not an ordinary Domain Ancestor Method, he combined the many holy techniques he had cultivated, as well as the Void Ancestor Method, the incomplete Imperial Ancestor Method, and the Strength Ancestor Method, and some mysteries of the Origin Method, plus his own Endless Dao, to create a Domain Ancestor Method with infinite potential.

If you want to create such a domain ancestor method, you can imagine how difficult it is, ordinary geniuses can't create it at all, but Ye Tian has vaguely found a direction with the help of the Dream Realm.

If you give him enough time, he can be sure of creating it.

Once created, such a Domain Ancestor Method can definitely become a Superiorless Domain Ancestral Method, or even far surpass the ordinary Domainless Ancestor Method.

10,000 years!

100,000 years!

Millions of years!

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

Tens of millions of years is not a very long time for the top domain ancestors, but at this time, the effect of the Dream Realm is very poor, and many domain ancestors are not ready to waste time, and leave the Dream Realm one by one.

And Ye Tian was still contemplating, at this time he was already about to create the Domain Ancestor Method.

this day.

Buzz Buzz!!!!

A faint phantory shadow appeared on Ye Tian's body, as if he was a supreme being.

As soon as this phantom appeared, many taboo rules froze one by one, and it seemed to be walking in the depths of endless time and space, regarding time and space as infallible and above all rules.

Its aura terrifies all geniuses.

This vision appeared and immediately shocked all the geniuses.

"This is a vision that only exists in the creation of the Superior Domain Ancestral Method, how is it possible, how can the Dead Universe Holy Son create the Superior Domain Ancestral Method?"

Many geniuses do not believe it.

After all, the Dead Saint Son is actually not very strong, and his talent is just like that, and he is only in the middle among the many Saint Sons.

For example, the many Holy Sons of the Destruction Holy Clan, one by one, can crush the Dead Universe Holy Son.

None of them had any hope of creating a Peerless Domain Ancestral Method, and why did the Son of the Dead Universe Son?

Eat one's heart out!

All the geniuses were jealous, and all of them didn't want to believe this scene, but they had to believe it.

But when everyone didn't know it, this vision was only part of it, and the next vision was beyond everyone's expectations.

I saw that the phantom looked back at Ye Tian, and the face of the phantom gradually condensed, but it was not the face of the Holy Son of the Dead Universe, but the face of Ye Tian.

It seemed to be Ye Tian in the future, full of the aura of the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and even presented the mysteries of the Supreme Domain Ancestor-level method, and there were still a large number of traces of holy skills on its body.

What's more, it actually showed a trace of the aura of the ancestor on its body.

But.

The other geniuses did not pay attention to this impression, and it was fleeting, and soon disappeared.

"There's something wrong with my vision, it doesn't seem to be the vision of the Ancestral Law of the Superior Domain, it's ......"

Ye Tian had a guess in his heart.

Perhaps the method he created was already above the Ancestor Method of the Peerless Domain, but it was not the Ancestor Method.

Strictly speaking, it is between the Ancestor Method of the Superior Domain and the Ancestor Law, and it is not weaker than the incomplete version of the Ancestor Law.

"This Domain Ancestral Law is called the Endless Domain Law!"

Ye Tian took the name.

Having created the Endless Domain Law, Ye Tian was ready to leave the Dream Realm.

But that's when the mutation began.

Rumble!!!!!

A suction force came, pulling Ye Tian's consciousness to a special area.

Wow!

Ye Tian's consciousness came to a void, and this void gave birth to an ancient well.

This ancient well is constantly gushing out a large amount of water, spreading to the unknown depths.

From this ancient well, Ye Tian sensed the aura of the holy relic.

Moreover, the aura of this holy relic is exactly the same as that of the River of Dreams.

"This ......"

Ye Tian was shocked.

What's going on?

Could it be that—

Ye Tian had a guess in his heart, that is, the River of Dreams was not a real holy relic, but an external manifestation of the holy relic, and the real holy relic was actually this ancient well.

Even the Dream Clan may not have known about the existence of this ancient well, otherwise, he would not have been able to reach here.

"Why am I here?"

Ye Tian was very curious at this time.

What makes him special from other evil geniuses is that he created the Endless Domain Law, and nothing else is special.

After all, his current body is a copy of the Dead Saint Son, and the Dead Saint Son is not a demonic genius, just an ordinary Saint Son.

Therefore, the reason why he was able to enter here was definitely not because of the Dead Universe Holy Son, but because of the Endless Domain Law.

"It seems that the Fantasy Realm is similar to an assessment, and the Endless Domain Law has reached the standard, which is why I have entered here!"

Ye Tian guessed.

The River of Dreams is evaluated as the ninth on the list of holy relics of destruction, and this ancient well is afraid that it is above the River of Dreams, after all, the River of Dreams is only the external embodiment of the ancient well holy relics.

If you can get this ancient well holy relic, then the harvest will be too great!

Ye Tian approached the ancient well, and when he saw that there was nothing wrong, he entered the ancient well.

"Refining!"

Ye Tian's consciousness continued to refine this ancient well holy relic, and the holy relic did not resist, allowing Ye Tian to refine this ancient well holy relic.

Obviously, Ye Tian is equivalent to passing the holy relic assessment and no longer resisting.

Time passed slowly, and it took Ye Tian a full 1 million years to allow him to initially refine this ancient well.

At this time, he also knew the name and purpose of this ancient well holy relic.

It is called the Creation Mixed Element Well, and its main role is to create the world, creating an incomparably powerful world, above all worlds.

As the master of the Creation Mixed Yuan Well, he can use the opportunity of creation to ascend to an extremely high realm, and he can also use that world to comprehend and cultivate, just like using the Dream Realm to cultivate at the same time.

After knowing the usefulness of the Genesis Mixed Yuan Well, Ye Tian was excited.

Once he brought this Creation Mixed Yuan Well back to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm could easily break the limit of the Forbidden Realm and step into another world level.

Moreover, the Daoshan Realm will also benefit from this and continue to evolve.

In this way, the potential of the Dao Mountain Realm and the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm in the future will be extremely huge, and perhaps after endless years, they will be able to grow into a huge and prosperous area second only to the Dark Sacred Domain and the Dark Destruction Domain!

"Such a holy relic is definitely the number one on the list of holy relics of destruction!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.
